title: Lololowka Compressed Earth
description: this mod about Lololowka Compressed Earth
body:
This mod is inspired by Lololoshka's video called "😨 Minecraft SPEEDRUNNER vs 3 HUNTERS • [+ FLIGHT]". It adds a unique gameplay element that is perfect for dynamic survival or challenges.

Compressed Earth:
Craft a block of compressed earth from 9 blocks of normal earth in a crafting table. This block unlocks a new gameplay mechanic:
Spectator Effect: Use compressed earth to temporarily switch to spectator mode for 4 seconds. This allows you to quickly assess the terrain or find needed resources.
Balance and Fairness: To prevent abuse, the ability to use compressed earth is restored after 15 seconds.
This feature adds strategic options to the game, especially for speedrunners who want to quickly explore the world, avoid pursuit or find the best routes!
